description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the greyltc/archlinux:latest Docker image and defines a before_script that runs pacman -Sy, installs python, nodejs, npm, yarn, python-pip and chromium via pacman, runs yarn --pure-lockfile --cache-folder .yarn-cache, installs Python test requirements with pip install -r requirements/test.txt, executes python manage.py makemigrations and migrate, and builds the frontend with yarn run build. Cache the pip directory (~/.cache/pip/) and the Yarn cache (/.yarn_cache/). Add a test job in the test stage that runs pytest --cov-report term | tee python_cov, then yarn run unit | tee js_cov, then python get_coverage.py, and sets a coverage regex '/cov: ([0-9]+.?[0-9]+%)/'.
